subcodes.first_line: The mention of God from the Tree of Paradise was indeed witnessed upon the Temple of the Youth, and verily He speaketh in all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله عن شجره الفردوس قد کان علی هیکل الغلام مشهودا و انه لینطق فی کل شیء
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
